title: Oil price layers
description: Benchmark, realised refiner cost, and investor-accessible oil exposure.
plainLanguageSummary: Benchmark, realised refiner cost, and investor-accessible oil exposure.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Raw monthly values. Transformations are calculated in-browser within each series; indexed = 100 at first visible observation.
calculation.explanation: USO is a share price and must not be read on a barrel-price axis in raw mode.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
limitations: USO is a share price and must not be read on a barrel-price axis in raw mode.

methodology.formula: Raw monthly values. Transformations are calculated in-browser within each series; indexed = 100 at first visible observation.
methodology.notes: USO is a share price and must not be read on a barrel-price axis in raw mode.
